data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. SPOT THE ANGEL produced a moderate effort last time when seventh at this track over 295m behind Mitcham Eric (17.83) in a Class 2. Placed at her previous run. Remains without a win from the draw but has been in the placings two times from three attempts. Better than the latest run and deserves another chance. 4. GOODWYN stalked the pace from a low draw last start and fought on well to finish a neck away in second (17.58) at this track in a Class 1 over 295m. Has a strong record out of this box with two wins and a minor placing from four starts. Can feature again. 2. FLAWLESS CHATTER jumps from box 2 again after finishing a 6 length third (23.11) last time at Ascot Park over 390m. This tougher but looks a leading chance again. 7. SELENA JEWEL is a last start winner and can go on with it. Odds will be appealing.","runners":[8,4,2,7],"exclusive":false}
